schema.description: All expressions and their current state for a VRM model

items.description: Information about a single VRM expression

weight.description: Current weight of the expression (0.0 to 1.0)

isBinary.description: Whether the expression is binary (on/off) rather than continuous

items.title: ExpressionInfo

expressions.description: List of all expressions with their current weights and settings

schema.title: ExpressionsResponse
